channel.title: Papers on Aria's Site
channel.description: Recent content in Papers on Aria's Site

item.title: 【Papers】
item.description: ChatHaruhi: Reviving Anime Character in Reality via Large Language Model(In Processing) 🤖 Analysis and Evaluation of City Urban Traffic.Patent NO.: CN201911373330.4.(Chinese Patent) 💻 Transportation Coordination and Route Recommendation System. Patent NO.: 201911292359.X.(Chinese Patent) 💻 Real-time traffic state-driven signal control optimization system and method(Chinese Patent) 💻 Yaying Fei, Lihua Chen, Xiaozhi Zhang, Wei Zhang. ”Study on the snap-through behavior of bistable plates”. ASME Conference on Smart Materials, Adaptive Structures and Intelligent Systems.
